'''chazhaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumocytosis|pneumocytosis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-zh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumocytosis|pneumocytosis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chazhaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæzhæbæth|chæzhæbæth]] || [[word:chæzhæbæj|chæzhæbæj]] || [[word:chæzhæbæsh|chæzhæbæsh]] || [[word:chæzhæbæ|chæzhæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chazhazhabath|chazhazhabath]] || [[word:chazhazhabaj|chazhazhabaj]] || [[word:chazhazhabash|chazhazhabash]] || [[word:chazhazhaba|chazhazhaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chazhabath|chazhabath]] || [[word:chazhabaj|chazhabaj]] || [[word:chazhabash|chazhabash]] || [[word:chazhaba|chazhaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chazhafbath|chazhafbath]] || [[word:chazhafbaj|chazhafbaj]] || [[word:chazhafbash|chazhafbash]] || [[word:chazhafbaf|chazhafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chazhabatha|chazhabatha]] || [[word:chazhabaja|chazhabaja]] || [[word:chazhabasha|chazhabasha]] || [[word:chazhabaka|chazhabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chazhabath|chazhabath]] || [[word:chazhabaj|chazhabaj]] || [[word:chazhabash|chazhabash]] || [[word:chazhaba|chazhaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chazhabathal|chazhabathal]] || [[word:chazhabajal|chazhabajal]] || [[word:chazhabashal|chazhabashal]] || [[word:chazhabakal|chazhabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chazhabathatha|chazhabathatha]] || [[word:chazhabajaja|chazhabajaja]] || [[word:chazhabashasha|chazhabashasha]] || [[word:chazhabaka|chazhabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chazhabathan|chazhabathan]] || [[word:chazhabajan|chazhabajan]] || [[word:chazhabashan|chazhabashan]] || [[word:chazhabakan|chazhabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chazhabathaoro|chazhabathaoro]] || [[word:chazhabajaoro|chazhabajaoro]] || [[word:chazhabashaoro|chazhabashaoro]] || [[word:chazhabakaoro|chazhabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
